headline: IBM pays $17M fine to end DOJ suit over DEI programs
summary: IBM entered into a $17 million settlement agreement on Friday with the U.S. DOJ over allegations that it engaged in “illegal DEI practices.”

headline: Quantum Computing Stocks: Is Google's Tech Roadmap Changing?
summary: In a big development for quantum computing stocks, Google could switch from superconducting to neutral atom technology. Quantum computing has been viewed as a long-term catalyst for Google stock.

headline: Integrated Data Services Announces Sujey Edward as Chief Strategy and Innovation Officer
summary: TYSONS CORNER, Va., April 13, 2026--Integrated Data Services (IDS), part of the Arlington Capital Partners portfolio, announces the appointment of Sujey Edward as Chief Strategy and Innovation Officer. In this role, he will help shape the company’s future by bringing together strategy, technology, and innovation to drive meaningful impact. His focus will be on ensuring IDS’s platform remains best of breed while expanding into new markets and pursuing strategic acquisitions to accelerate growth.

His focus will be on ensuring IDS’s platform remains best of breed while expanding into new markets and pursuing strategic acquisitions to accelerate growth.
